title: Outlook / Email Client Setup on a New Device
text:
Q: How do I set up Outlook or my email client on a new device?
A: Windows: Step 1 - Open Outlook from the Start menu. Step 2 - If prompted, select 'Add Account'. If not, go to File > Account Settings > Account Settings, then click 'New'. Step 3 - Choose 'Email Account' and click 'Next'. Step 4 - Enter your name, email address, and password, then click 'Next'. Step 5 - Outlook will test your account settings; once completed, click 'Finish'. macOS: Step 1 - Open Outlook from the Applications folder. Step 2 - If prompted, select 'Get Started' and then 'Add Account'. Step 3 - Enter your email address and click 'Continue'. Step 4 - Enter your password when prompted and click 'Add Account'. Step 5 - Once your account is verified, click 'Done'. For both systems, ensure you have your email credentials ready, including your username and password. If you encounter issues, check your internet connection or consult the IT helpdesk for further assistance.
